chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-233 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For order on M.A.No.1931/ 2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 18-11-2025. Applicant in person. Mr. Abdul Ghaffar Narejo advocate for the respondent No.4 a/w respondent No.4. Mr. Dhani Bakhsh Mari, A.P.G. = On last date of hearing, learned counsel for the applicant sought time to address about maintainability of instant Criminal Miscellaneous application under section 561-A Cr.P.C on the ground that this Court has rendered Order dated 25-08-2025 in Criminal Miscellaneous application No.S-26 of 2025 whereby it has been held that application under section 561-A Cr.P.C is not maintainable against order passed by learned Ex- Officio Justice of Peace and aggrieved person has to file Constitutional Petition before Divisional Bench of this Court. In view of above, this Criminal Miscellaneous application alongwith listed application is dismissed. However, applicant is at liberty to file Constitutional Petition before Divisional Bench of this Court, if so desired. JUDGE *Saleem*
